arguments.command: dotnet tool list -g 2>/dev/null | grep -i report; which reportgenerator 2>/dev/null; dotnet reportgenerator 2>/dev/null | head -5

data.reasoningText: Now let me generate a readable coverage report. I can use `dotnet-reportgenerator` or just parse the XML myself. Let me check if reportgenerator is available, and also just summarize the data from the XML.
